name: Keren Charles Dongo, Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: A note for Derek: If we miss our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, there's one message I don't want to send tomorrow: We fell short. Here's why this matters so much to all of us: ------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, there's one message I _don 't_ want to send [tomorrow:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1161/3e0906/6dc85268/3e36e06c/2005326267/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&source=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND") **_We fell short._**

Here's why this matters so much to all of us:
* **_If_** we miss our fundraising goal for this month, then all of our plans from now until Election Day will be thrown off track and some things will need to be cut.
*
* **_If_** we have to cut resources, then we won't be able to fully support Tim and the Congressional candidates the way we need to.
*
* **_And if_ we can't fully support Tim's plan for Virginia, we can't help Democrats across the country win back the House and Senate.**

We're still short of our August fundraising goal, and the deadline is just hours away. **We need[125 supporters](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1161/3e0906/6dc85268/3e36e063/2005326267/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+125+supporters&utm_campaign=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&source=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND") to step up before [midnight](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1161/3e0906/6dc85268/3e36e061/2005326267/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+midnight&utm_campaign=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND&source=20180831_2_FR_KCD_EOM-8-If-LDND") because I don't want to have to send that message. name: Tracy Newman
subject: One last ask before before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This is the most important thing you can do for the climate today.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78289/2f5ea88d/76370efd/2cbc54e8/59650292/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&refcode=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&utm_campaign=eom-climate-5&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, 2018 is the hottest year on record -- hotter even than the three previous record holders in 2015, 2016, and 2017. Climate change-induced wildfires continue to burn up and down the West Coast. In response, Secretary Zinke is trying to capitalize on these fires to open national lands for clearcutting by the timber industry. In the other Washington, nothing is being done about climate change -- in fact, it's the opposite. President Trump is rolling back the Obama-era Clean Power Plan, and his own administration predicts 1,400 more people will die per year as a result of the increased pollution. [**Jay's taking climate action right here and right now. Before our official end-of-the-month deadline, chip in to be part of our climate action movement.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78289/2f5ea88d/76370efd/2cbc54e8/59650292/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&refcode=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&utm_campaign=eom-climate-5&utm_medium=ema") **Look, friend, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important. But we're facing a critical end-of-month deadline and, I'll be honest, we're dangerously at risk of missing our goal. We need to do everything we can right now to fight climate change -- or our years will just get hotter and hotter, and we'll see even more disasters.** [**The most important thing you can do right now to fight climate change is to make sure we can keep up our climate leadership. Chip in now before our end-of-month deadline to power our efforts:**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78289/2f5ea88d/76370efd/2cbc54e8/59650292/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&refcode=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&utm_campaign=eom-climate-5&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78289/2f5ea88d/76370efd/2cbc54e8/59650292/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&refcode=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-5&utm_campaign=eom-climate-5&utm_medium=ema")
---
Together, we're building a global movement to take on climate change. And now more than ever, with Trump's coal agenda looming and wildfires burning, we need your support.
Thanks,
Tracy

clean_body: This is the most important thing you can do for the climate today. | "" Dear Friend, 2018 is the hottest year on record -- hotter even than the three previous record holders in 2015, 2016, and 2017. Climate change-induced wildfires continue to burn up and down the West Coast. In response, Secretary Zinke is trying to capitalize on these fires to open national lands for clearcutting by the timber industry. In the other Washington, nothing is being done about climate change -- in fact, it's the opposite. President Trump is rolling back the Obama-era Clean Power Plan, and his own administration predicts 1,400 more people will die per year as a result of the increased pollution. "" Look, friend, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important. But we're facing a critical end-of-month deadline and, I'll be honest, we're dangerously at risk of missing our goal. We need to do everything we can right now to fight climate change -- or our years will just get hotter and hotter, and we'll see even more disasters. "" | "" Together, we're building a global movement to take on climate change. And now more than ever, with Trump's coal agenda looming and wildfires burning, we need your support. Thanks, Tracy ""

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why I'm Endorsing J.D. Scholten
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
In Congress, I’ve made it a priority to fight for working families across America and to stand up to the big banks, giant corporations, and the lobbyists that have left our working families behind.
This is a fight that must be won, and to win, we’re going to need to put more people in Congress who hold these same values -- people who will stand up for working-class Americans and make it a priority to get big money out of politics.
That’s why **I’m proud to stand with J.D. Scholten** , who is running in Iowa’s 4th District against arguably the most divisive member of Congress in Steve King.
The contrast couldn’t be more clear. King’s biggest lifetime corporate PAC donor is the American Bankers Association -- while J.D. himself isn’t taking a dime in corporate PAC money from anyone.
And yet, J.D. has outraised his opponent thanks to contributions from more than 13,000 individual grassroots donors!
J.D. has made getting big money out of politics a focal point of his campaign -- and he isn’t just talking the talk, he’s walking the walk. [**_And that’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign by chipping in whatever you can today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2066517/10738033/587424766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTQzMjU3OC1lZmFkLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=plrZKuuEO1yPBR_6GcH6aryGCc0934c9wp7iNk8xYpQ=)
But that’s just part of why this race is so important. **Steve King was just named as one of the 15 “Worst for Women” in Congress** because, among other things, he “blamed the use of contraception for a ‘dying civilization’ and declared U.S. citizens should be increasing birth rates to keep out immigrants.”
J.D.’s campaign motto is “Standing Tall for All” - not because he’s 6’6”, but because he stands for an economy, a government, and a healthcare system that will work for all of the people of his district, and because he’s fighting for a community where racism, sexism, bigotry, and hatred aren’t welcome.
**It is my pleasure to endorse J.D. Scholten in this pivotal race,** and I look forward to the possibility of calling him an ally in Congress.
[**_Please join me in supporting J.D. with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2066518/10738034/587424766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTQzMjU3OC1lZmFkLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=plrZKuuEO1yPBR_6GcH6aryGCc0934c9wp7iNk8xYpQ=)
Thanks for joining me in the fight to “Stand Tall” for J.D.,
Elizabeth
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2066519/10738035/587424766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTQzMjU3OC1lZmFkLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=plrZKuuEO1yPBR_6GcH6aryGCc0934c9wp7iNk8xYpQ=)

##
[**Consumer Confidence Pops in August to Highest Level Since October 2000**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTAxLjk0MzYzMTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwMS45NDM2MzE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxMTE0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-pops-august-highest-level-since-october-2000/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -CNBC “Consumer confidence rose in August to its highest level since October 2000, building on July’s solid result,” Michael Sheetz writes. “These historically high confidence levels should continue to support healthy consumer spending in the near-term,” said Lynn Franco, director of economic indicators at The Conference Board. [**Trump Marks Award of $91 Million in Anti-Drug Grants**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTAxLjk0MzYzMTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwMS45NDM2MzE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxMTE0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.apnews.com/1f1ddd8bb9ff474d8eeb9724db763e2b/Trump-marks-award-of-%2491-million-in-anti-drug-grants) -_The Associated Press_ President Trump is awarding $91 million in grants to a record number of community anti-drug coalitions, _The Associated Press_ reported this week. “The White House says all 50 states will benefit from the grants from the White House Office of National Drug Control Policy that aim to ‘strengthen the infrastructure among local partners.’” [**Dozens at Facebook Unite to Challenge Its ‘Intolerant’ Liberal Culture**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTAxLjk0MzYzMTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwMS45NDM2MzE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxMTE0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.nytimes.com/2018/08/28/technology/inside-facebook-employees-political-bias.html) -_The New York Times_ “The post went up quietly on Facebook’s internal message board last week. Titled ‘We Have a Problem With Political Diversity,’ it quickly took off inside the social network,” Kate Conger and Sheera Frenkel explain. “We are a political monoculture that’s intolerant of different views,” Facebook engineer Brian Amerige wrote in the post. Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum's win proved what was possible when the people of Florida band together to rebuild our state into one that works for all -- not just those at the top of the economic ladder.

However, we knew it was only a matter of time before the attacks started -- we just didn't think they'd come this soon.

Both Donald Trump and our Republican opponent, Ron DeSantis, have already started spewing false, negative, and divisive attacks against Mayor Gillum and this campaign. So there's no doubt that this is going to be a tough fight. But we're going to run this general election with class, just like we did in the primary.

We showed everyone how the power of everyday people, coming together and showing up, can drive change. Political pundits said Mayor Gillum couldn't win -- but thanks to your incredible generosity, support, and commitment to making Florida a better place for all of us, we won.

**[And now, we're one step closer to electing a true progressive as Florida's next Governor. I hope you can take this Labor Day weekend and have some fun with your friends and loved ones. Then it's back to work next week! Tina | Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ""

name: Jason Yates
subject: She can’t vote. But YOU can.
body:
Peter,
We’ve all been guilty at some point in our lives of taking our ability to vote for granted.
But what if we _couldn’t_ vote this election?
Kristen isn’t yet old enough to vote this fall, but she already knows the powerful influence of her vote.
**_“[My vote matters for the generations to come. I fight not only for my freedom, but for the freedom of a future America](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBNf8nKDKTnQq07OA3uZ0BJfkvnUXuDxeuBrJF8kdueN9bTo6UtJITAUz2LzUlq3Pgc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180901com01&n=1).”_**
When we received [this essay](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBNf8nKDKTnQq07OA3uZ0BJfkvnUXuDxeuBrJF8kdueN9bTo6UtJITAUz2LzUlq3Pgc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180901com01&n=2) from Kristen, a high school sophomore, we knew this would be something you would want to read.
Despite many discouraging stories about the next generations’ view of government, there are many Christian youth ignored by the media cycle who understand the uniqueness of America’s founding and the vigilance required to protect the freedoms we enjoy;
Kristen’s strong conviction of the immeasurable value of one’s vote is a message millions of Americans need to be reminded of today.
With individuals like Kristen in the next generation, there is tremendous hope for America.
Read her moving article [My Vote Matters](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBNf8nKDKTnQq07OA3uZ0BJfkvnUXuDxeuBrJF8kdueN9bTo6UtJITAUz2LzUlq3Pgc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180901com01&n=3), and share it with your friends. It will inspire readers to get out and vote this election—because YOU can!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdK4k3HxH01oD63ZpN_IJlPNatv8_0oIrKklbMGLigco6&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180901com01&n=4)

On the road to El Paso.

On Thursday in Sweetwater, Tom Ritchey introduced me at our town hall at
the Argos bookstore. Amy and I had met Tom and his wife at a gas station
in Fort Davis at the outset of this trip, weeks ago. We had just picked up
our kids from Prude Ranch and were on our way to Alpine when Tom took the
time to introduce himself and say hello to us.

It made me happy to see us come full circle -- after traveling to Del Rio,
Corpus Christi, Nacogdoches, DeSoto, Galveston, Missouri City, Longview,
Muleshoe, Austin, Comanche, Edna, Houston, Alice, Victoria, Brownsville,
Beaumont, Tyler, Laredo, Iraan, Lubbock, Rockport, McAllen, Lampasas and
many, many more communities -- to be back in West Texas, to see Tom again
in his hometown, where he is the winningest football coach in Sweetwater
history, and to have such a great conversation with the community about
anything and everything on our minds...to share my impressions of the
amazing Collegiate High public school I had visited earlier in the day in
Roscoe, to listen to those I want to serve tell me about healthcare,
education, delivering for our veterans -- it just made me grateful to be
doing this and to be doing it with so many wonderful people.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1002&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in Sweetwater.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1003&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
With Coach Tom Ritchey and his wife.

Yesterday, we closed out our last stop on this road trip at a rally in El
Paso, the town we started from 34 days before, the place Amy and I are
raising Ulysses, Molly and Henry, the center of my world. Today, I am
thinking through all of the amazing people we’ve met, all the
extraordinary volunteers and field staff who made these meetings possible
(shoutout to our Ambassadors!), all of the good energy. Everywhere we go
in Texas, we find that people are focused on the future.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1004&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in McAllen.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1005&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in Lubbock.

We’re not running against anyone else or another political party. We’re
running to do our best for this country, for every one of us. To make sure
that we can all learn to our full potential by getting behind our public
educators; to ensure that we are all well enough to contribute to our
maximum capacity in life because we will lead on universal, guaranteed
healthcare; to use our standing as the most diverse state in the country
to rewrite our immigration laws in our own image; to ensure that our
criminal justice system treats everyone with dignity, respect and provides
equal justice; to know that every one of us can find work that ensures
purpose, function and a living wage, that we have access to the higher
education, the skills and the training to be able to find it; to be there
for those who’ve borne the battle, with resources, oversight and
accountability for veterans’ services -- to move forward, always. With
confidence, courage, strength and, in Truman’s words, “with an unstoppable
determination to do the job at hand.” Leave the fear, the anxiety, the
hatred and the smallness behind.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1006&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in Edna.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1007&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in Comanche.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1008&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Town hall in Iraan.

This is the most encouraged, the most hopeful, the most excited I’ve been
for the future of this country. Despite the disappointments we might face,
the dysfunction that defines so much of our national government today, the
deep damage we do with policies of family separation or trade wars that
hurt our farmers, ranchers and exporters -- I know that we are a match for
this moment, that Texas will help lead this country in a better direction.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1009&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Back-to-school town hall in Austin. Hook 'em!

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6597?refcode=em20180901&t=1010&akid=6431%2E444211%2EnxlbO4 ]Beto for Texas
Opening our new Houston HQ with Representative Sheila Jackson Lee.

I know that because I’ve met you everywhere in Texas, in every county in
the state. I’ve seen the determination to do better for yourself, for your
kids, for this state, for this country, for this generation and for every
generation that follows.

You’ve inspired me, filled me with hope and you give me confidence that we
will win this election and that we will deliver on the very high
expectations that we’ve set with, by and for one another.

I am grateful to be doing this with you.

Beto

| | Derek, you're one of our most active supporters.

That's why we wanted you to be the first to know: **We met our August fundraising goal, and we couldn 't have done it without you. Thank you so much, Derek!**

This is a big deal. Thanks to you, we're on track for September and ready to close out the final fundraising quarter of this election cycle strong. **Here 's what we've done with the money:**
* We put our first TV ad on the airwaves.
* We produced our first piece of mail to go out to undecided voters throughout Virginia!
* **And Tim was able to attend more than 60 events throughout the Commonwealth and talk to voters, a feat only possible because people like you made sure he was caught up on fundraising.**

As we get closer to Election Day (just 2 months to go!), we'll need this strong grassroots team to help re-elect Tim _and_ help Democrats across the Commonwealth flip crucial seats from red to blue.

So whether you chip in, take our surveys, add your name to petitions, or just stay up-to-date with the campaign by reading these emails, we're so glad to have you with us as we enter the final stretch of this campaign! **Let Tim know you 'll stand with him through [November 6th:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f116f/3e0906/6dd84f04/3e36e723/3928718429/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/Stand-With-Tim?source=20180901_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-You&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180901_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-You") [Sign here and commit to staying an active member of Team Kaine.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f116f/3e0906/6dd84f04/3e36e722/3928718429/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/Stand-With-Tim?source=20180901_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-You&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sign+here+and+commit+to+staying+an+activ&utm_campaign=20180901_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-You")**

subject: You give me hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

| | Over the past month, it seemed like every breaking news alert brought bad news. We're facing a lot as a nation. Peter, it's easy to get discouraged with all this going on. But I'm not discouraged -- I'm incredibly hopeful. And there's one main reason why: **You.** This grassroots network never ceases to do amazing things. We set an aggressive fundraising goal in August, and you hit it. Every time we asked you to step up, you did. And with an average online contribution of $26, we managed to raise $450,000 and put ourselves in a great position as the final FEC fundraising quarter of this election draws near. **I can't thank you enough for all of your help this month.** Together, we will not only win this campaign in November, but we will get this country back on the right track. We truly are one of the strongest grassroots movements in the country, and that's all thanks to you. With immense gratitude, Sherrod | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff6e/4462dc26/604b5200/2006bc0d/1340289775/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180901?refcode=sbe180901_m")
